headline: Woodforest National Bank Selects Jack Henry to Power Growth with a Modern, Integrated Platform
summary: Jack Henry® (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that Woodforest National, a multi-state bank with more than $9 billion in assets, has selected Jack Henry to support its continued growth, modernization, and long-term digital strategy.
